generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations within AGREE clauses.
Move implementation-specific guarantees to the implementation annex; component type annexes should reference only visible features.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation is explicitly available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or dependencies not present in the AADL model.
Avoid converting Boolean domain values into integers for comparisons.
